message:
refactor: deduplicate tunnel choice validation, ngrok URL parsing, and OAuth redirect

- Extract resolveChoice() in tunnel.zig to share choice validation logic
- Simplify extractNgrokUrl() to delegate to extractJsonField()
- Extract setPublicUrl() helper to deduplicate URL buffer copy pattern
- Extract createOAuthSessionAndRedirect() in http_server.zig
- Replace local formatBytes with import from utils in DownloadProgressDialog
